This week in NYC, expect a weather roller coaster, significant road closures for the St. Patrick's Day parade, and a tragic fentanyl-related death of a child leading to parental charges, alongside ongoing labor disputes and community concerns regarding homelessness and public safety.

### Risks & Alerts

- NYC weather this week will fluctuate significantly, impacting daily plans. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- St. Patrick’s Day parade on March 22 will cause significant road closures throughout NYC. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- NYC parents charged after 4-year-old dies from fentanyl exposure. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
